instructions: Connect the board via USB to the Raspberry Pi
Make sure the board is powered.
Press and hold the BOOT button on the board.
Press and release the RESET button on the board.

maxPower.comment: The hotend heater power must be limited to 99.5% (max_power: 0.995) to enable the correct operation of Orbitool O2s protection features. Do not set max_power to a value greater than 0.995.

pwmCycleTime.comment: To improve the heater power calculation accuracy, the heater PWM is forced to 100Hz (instead of the 10Hz default of Klipper).

inputVoltagePwmCycleTime.comment: The Orbitool O2s DC-DC fan control circuit is designed for a command signal of 10kHz. Do not change.

maxPower.comment: Use max_power: 0.5 for 12V, max_power: 1 for 24V (in printer.cfg)

inputVoltagePwmCycleTime.comment: The Orbitool O2s DC-DC fan control circuit is designed for a command signal of 10kHz. Do not change.
